batches.description: Create 26 domain overview notes + master ecosystem MOC + _sessions infrastructure
batches.notes: 26 domain overview notes in 01_Domains/{slug}/ + Map-Venue-Operations-Ecosystem.md in 07_MOCs/. All pass schema validation.

batches.description: Safety, Risk, Security, Crowd Management, Emergency Management
batches.notes: 22 concept notes (12 safety, 6 security, 4 crowd-management) + 30 source notes. Safety-and-risk at working depth.
23 concept notes (14 facilities, 7 sustainability, 2 technology) + 30 source notes. Facilities at working depth. Sustainability at minimum viable.

batches.description: Food & Beverage, Supply Chain, Procurement, Logistics
batches.notes: 23 concept notes (12 F&B, 4 supply chain, 3 logistics, 2 legal, 2 people) + 30 source notes. F&B at working depth (12). Supply chain and logistics at minimum viable.
20 concept notes (8 event-ops, 9 AV, 2 technology, 1 accessibility) + 30 source notes. Event-ops and AV at working depth.

batches.description: Commercial, Premium/VIP, Marketing, Parking, Ticketing, Booking
batches.notes: 22 concept notes (5 premium, 10 parking, 5 marketing, 1 commercial, 1 guest-experience) + 30 source notes. Parking at working depth (10). Premium and marketing at minimum viable (5 each).

batches.description: Legal & Compliance, Insurance, Accessibility, Community Impact
batches.notes: 16 concept notes (5 legal, 6 accessibility, 3 people-and-culture, 2 strategy) + 30 source notes. Legal and accessibility at minimum viable (7 each). People-and-culture at minimum viable (5).
12 concept notes (7 quality/CI, 1 commercial, 1 guest-experience, 1 sustainability, 1 safety, 1 strategy) + 30 source notes. Quality-and-continuous-improvement reaches minimum viable (7).

batches.description: Operationally Distinct Functions by Venue Type (cross-domain enrichment)
batches.notes: 14 venue-type-specific concept notes (4 AV, 4 event-ops, 3 guest-experience, 1 premium, 1 safety, 1 ticketing) + 20 source notes. Cross-domain enrichment with stadium/arena, PAC, theme-park, and fairground-specific operations.

batches.description: Extract venue ops intelligence from original 5 DR reports
batches.notes: 17 concept notes + 30 source notes. DR-OpEx-CI high yield (14), DR-AI-Change medium yield (3), DR-Podcast-Behavior/Launch/Competitive-GTM zero yield (podcast/GTM focus). Financial-operations domain established. Data-and-analytics/booking-sales/tenant-relations remain 0 (no content). First Recon manifest rejected at Ready gate for URL fabrication; re-dispatched with verbatim-quote requirement. Orphan resolution deferred to batch-10.

batches.description: Cross-domain linking, orphan detection, relationship density audit
batches.notes: Resolved 17 batch-09 orphans with 52 bidirectional related_to links across 39 concept notes. Average 2.9 inbound links per resolved orphan. All 18 target files verified to exist. Semantic clusters formed: Disney/Service frameworks, Caesars/MGM/LEAN, AI adoption, Sustainability.

batches.description: Generate Maps of Content for all 26 domains + master ecosystem map
batches.notes: Create 07_MOCs/ notes. One per domain + master Map-Venue-Operations-Ecosystem. Generate Dataview dashboard data.

batches.description: Full vault validation, statistics, and completion report
batches.notes: Final pass: (1) Validate every note against schema, (2) Generate vault statistics, (3) Write completion report, (4) Update all domain node_counts, (5) Confirm GLRC provenance chain complete.
